title: The Merry Is Ready for the Stream
description: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Blackbeard, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy. The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Get a bottle of something good ready!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: To think it'd be this high...

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: I'm real pissed off right now!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: I've got no interest in small fries!

summary: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
